## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] DCO sign-off on commits (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Tests for new pure logic; CI green (ruff, mypy strict, pytest, web typecheck)
- [ ] Docs updated in the same PR (ROADMAP status, relevant docs/ page, CHANGELOG)
- [ ] No secrets, no sample footage with people/plates, no weakened security defaults
- [ ] Status honesty: nothing designed is presented as shipped
